params.name: Bloodhoph Letter
params.description:
Dear Gi-na, I know you took our babies away because you can't stand my bad temper! It was all my fault. Please don't take it out on the kids! I've bought you a limited Ferrari! Please accept my sincere apology and come back...
Always Yours, Bull Chief
